description: Create @quant/ml-runtime package with ONNX inference (server + browser), model loader, and feature store in packages/ml-pipeline/src/feature-store/
steps: Create packages/ml-runtime/package.json following @quant/auth pattern: name @quant/ml-runtime, private:true, type:module, main:src/index.ts, scripts with typecheck and test. Dependencies: onnxruntime-node, onnxruntime-web, zod, @quant/storage (workspace:*). DevDeps: @types/node, typescript, vitest.
Create packages/ml-runtime/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json with outDir:./dist, rootDir:./src, composite:true, include:['src/**/*'], exclude:['node_modules','dist'].
Create packages/ml-runtime/vitest.config.ts with defineConfig({ test: { globals:true, environment:'node' } }).

Create packages/ml-runtime/src/onnx-server.ts - OnnxServerRuntime class: loadModel(modelPath: string) that creates an InferenceSession (mock/interface the onnxruntime-node import), run(inputs: Record<string, Float32Array>) returning typed tensor outputs. Include session management, warm-up, and dispose methods. Use proper TypeScript interfaces for ONNX tensor types.

Create packages/ml-runtime/src/onnx-browser.ts - OnnxBrowserRuntime class: similar to server but using WebGPU/WASM execution providers. loadModel with ExecutionProvider config (webgpu, wasm, cpu fallback). run() method with same interface. Include capability detection for WebGPU availability.

Create packages/ml-runtime/src/model-loader.ts - ModelLoader class: download(modelUrl: string, version: string) that fetches from CDN or @quant/storage, caches locally with versioning, validates model integrity (checksum), provides getModelPath(name, version) for cached models, handles cache eviction.
Create packages/ml-runtime/src/index.ts - barrel exports for OnnxServerRuntime, OnnxBrowserRuntime, ModelLoader, and all types.
Create packages/ml-runtime/src/__tests__/onnx-server.test.ts - Test model loading, inference with mocked ONNX session, warm-up, error handling, dispose.
Create packages/ml-runtime/src/__tests__/onnx-browser.test.ts - Test browser runtime with WebGPU/WASM provider selection, model loading, inference.
Create packages/ml-runtime/src/__tests__/model-loader.test.ts - Test download, caching, version management, checksum validation, cache eviction.

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/feature-store/online-store.ts - OnlineFeatureStore class: Redis-backed (mocked interface) for user features, item features, recent interactions. Methods: getFeatures(entityId, featureNames) with <10ms target, setFeatures(), getRecentInteractions(userId, limit). Use typed feature schemas.

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/feature-store/offline-store.ts - OfflineFeatureStore class: S3 Parquet-backed (interface) for full history. Methods: writeFeatures(dataset), readFeatures(query), getTrainingData(dateRange). For training pipeline usage.

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/feature-store/feature-definitions.ts - Typed feature schemas using Zod. Define UserFeatureSchema, ItemFeatureSchema, InteractionFeatureSchema with all fields typed. Export feature registry with lookup by name.

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/feature-store/pipeline.ts - FeatureMaterializationPipeline class: materialize features from raw events, transform and write to online/offline stores. Methods: processEvent(event), materializeBatch(events), refreshFeatures(entityId).
Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/feature-store/index.ts - barrel exports for all feature-store modules.
Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/__tests__/online-store.test.ts - Test feature reads/writes with mocked Redis, verify <10ms reads (mocked), batch operations.
Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/__tests__/offline-store.test.ts - Test S3 read/write with mocked S3 client, Parquet format handling.
Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/__tests__/feature-definitions.test.ts - Test Zod schema validation, feature registry lookups.
Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/__tests__/pipeline.test.ts - Test event processing, materialization, feature refresh.
Update packages/ml-pipeline/src/index.ts to add exports for feature-store modules.
Run NODE_OPTIONS='' pnpm install to install new dependencies.
Run NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run to verify all tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: packages/ml-runtime exists with proper package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts
OnnxServerRuntime can load a model and run inference returning typed outputs
ModelLoader downloads, caches, and versions models with checksum validation
Feature definitions use Zod schemas with full typing
All test files pass with NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run
findings: Pre-existing test failures in packages/shared-ui (26 tests, ReferenceError: document is not defined - needs jsdom environment). NODE_OPTIONS must be empty for pnpm/vitest AND git commit hooks. Model loader needed sequence counter to break Date.now() ties in version eviction sort. The ml-pipeline package had no package.json/tsconfig.json/vitest.config.ts - created them following @quant/auth pattern.
